name: DMC Global Inc.
summary: DMC Global Inc. (BOOM) is a diversified industrial manufacturer operating through multiple business segments. The company is involved in explosive welding and metal-clad products, as well as architectural building products through its subsidiary Arcadia Products, LLC, in which it holds a 60% interest. DMC serves energy, construction, and industrial markets globally, offering specialty manufactured products and solutions.

products.name: Metal-clad/explosion-welded products
products.description: Specialty metal composite products manufactured using explosive welding technology for industrial applications.

products.name: Arcadia Products architectural building products
products.description: Architectural building products offered through Arcadia Products, LLC, a 60%-owned subsidiary.

partnerships.description: DMC Global holds a 60% interest in Arcadia Products, LLC, with potential acquisition of the remaining 40% minority interest.
DMC holds 60% interest in Arcadia Products, LLC, with potential acquisition of the remaining 40% minority interest.
